task_completion.description: Load the sample_polygon.geojson layer into QGIS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Layers' panel on the left side of the QGIS interface shows 'sample_polygon' as an active layer.

task_completion.description: Load the sample_points.geojson layer into QGIS
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Layers' panel on the left side of the QGIS interface shows 'sample_points' as an active layer.

task_completion.description: Style the polygon layer with a semi-transparent blue fill
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the map canvas, the 2 polygon features appear blue and semi-transparent (background grid or features can be seen through them). Alternatively, the Layer Styling panel for 'sample_polygon' shows a blue fill color and opacity set between 50% and 70%.

task_completion.description: Style the point layer with red markers at a size of 4.0 mm
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the map canvas, the 3 point features appear as red markers. Alternatively, the Layer Styling panel for 'sample_points' shows the color set to red and the size set to 4.0 mm.

task_completion.description: Save the QGIS project as styled_layers.qgz
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar at the very top of the QGIS application window displays 'styled_layers' or 'styled_layers.qgz', indicating the project has been successfully saved with the correct name.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGIS graphical user interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with QGIS menus, the Layer Styling panel, or the map canvas, rather than just terminal commands or Python console scripts executing the whole task.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual QGIS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The QGIS desktop environment is visible in the screenshots, not just a file manager or text editor.

integrity.description: The map canvas displays the actual expected geometries
integrity.visual_evidence: The map canvas shows exactly 2 polygons and 3 points, confirming the agent actually loaded the provided data and didn't just create empty layers with matching names.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The polygon layer is named 'sample_polygon' and contains exactly 2 features ('Area A', 'Area B'). The point layer is named 'sample_points' and contains exactly 3 features ('Point A', 'Point B', 'Point C'). The project must be saved as 'styled_layers.qgz', which will change the QGIS window title to include 'styled_layers'.
